sizing_rule.note: Use constant bet size OR f value strictly less than optimal f (where geometric mean HPR ≤ 1). Vince's principle: never bet full optimal f; use fractional f to ensure long-run profitability and reduce variance.

source_rule_text: Only trade with a constant bet size or use an f value less than the optimal f value that corresponds to a geometric mean HPR of 1 or less to ensure long-run profitability.
